theme_and_archetype.description: A high-end 'Retro-Futurism' tech dashboard designed for French students (CROUS). Focuses on a 'command center' aesthetic with deep blacks, subtle grid structures, and electric neon accents (nodding to WhatsApp's green but elevated to cyber-tech). Feels like an elite gaming hub.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing combined with a dense 'Control Room' grid for dashboard widgets.
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Containers use p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision. Sub-elements use p-4.

surface_styles.cards: Grid Borders: Flat background (#0B0B10), 1px subtle border (border-white/5), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle border brighten.
surface_styles.terminal_logs: Retro-Futurism: Deep black background (#000000), neon green borders (border-[#10B981]/50), subtle green drop-shadow on text.
surface_styles.active_buttons: The Tracing Beam: Dark background with a glowing 1px neon green border and a soft blur behind.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly set hover states (e.g., hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out, transition-transform duration-200 ease-out).

component_rules.buttons: Neumorphism mix: Sharp 1px border. Primary CTA uses bg-[#10B981] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#059669]. Secondary uses bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:border-white/30.
component_rules.forms_inputs: Shadcn based. bg-[#030305] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#10B981] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#10B981].
component_rules.tables_lists: Border-collapse layout. border-b border-white/5 for rows. Text left-aligned.
component_rules.badges: bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] border border-[#10B981]/30 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-2 py-1.

images.description: Student gamer avatar for the profile section
Dark abstract tech background (use as subtle low-opacity overlay or banner if needed)

icons.style: Clean, dense dashboard icons. Use Duotone weight for active elements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA standards against #030305 and #0B0B10.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-command-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Unbounded', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts via Google Fonts in the global CSS or layout file.
Use Tailwind CSS for all layout and styling. Do not use plain CSS unless absolutely necessary.
Use Shadcn UI components for Tables, Dialogs, Select, Inputs, but HEAVILY customize them to match the Dark Tech/Neon Green aesthetic defined here. Strip out the 'default Vercel look'.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' for the main overview page. Use dense spacing and 1px borders.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the macro layout (Sidebar + Main Content area).
The 'Journal d'activité' (Activity Log) must use the 'Retro-Futurism' terminal styling (JetBrains Mono font, subtle green borders, pure black background).
Translate all interface text to French as requested (e.g., 'Vue d\'ensemble', 'Auto-Réponses', 'Mots Bannis', 'Commandes', 'Paramètres').
Do not use whatsapp-web.js in the frontend. Ensure the backend handles all WhatsApp logic, while the frontend remains a pure management dashboard.
For Recharts (if used for stats), use the accent colors (#10B981, #06B6D4) and disable grid lines, or make them extremely faint (stroke='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)').
All .js/jsx files must follow these guidelines since the project does not use TypeScript (.tsx).
